raw_filing_not_found: ⚠️ Raw filing not found — bot may have been restarted.
raw_filing_caption:
📄 *{ticker} — {form}* ({date})
Raw SEC filing without AI analysis.
setwebhook_usage:
Usage: `/setwebhook https://xxx.ngrok.io`

First set up a tunnel:
```
pkg install cloudflared
cloudflared tunnel --url localhost:5050
```
Pass the resulting URL to this command.
webhook_registered:
✅ Webhook registered:
`{url}`

Restart the bot to switch to webhook mode:
`Ctrl+C → python bot.py`
webhook_register_failed: ❌ Failed to register webhook — is the URL reachable?
webhook_deleted:
✅ Webhook deleted — switched to polling mode.
Restart the bot: `Ctrl+C → python bot.py`
webhook_flask_missing:
⚠️ Webhook mode selected but Flask is not installed.
Run `pip install flask`, or switch to polling: `/delwebhook`
no_significant_risk_changes: ℹ️ _No significant changes detected in risk factors._
analysis_unavailable: ⚠️ Analysis unavailable — API did not respond.
watchlist_empty_with_hint: ℹ️ Watchlist is empty. Add tickers with `/addticker AAPL`.
fetch_error_timeout: ⏱ *{ticker}*: request timed out — SEC server may be slow. Try again shortly.
fetch_error_rate_limit: 🚦 *{ticker}*: rate limit hit — please wait a minute and retry.
fetch_error_network: 🌐 *{ticker}*: network error reaching SEC EDGAR. Check your connection.
fetch_error_not_found: 🔍 *{ticker}*: ticker not found on SEC EDGAR — check the symbol.
fetch_error_unknown: ❌ *{ticker}*: unexpected error fetching filings. Check the logs.
alert_new_filing:
🔔 *Alert: New SEC filing detected!*
Send `Check` for details.
background_error: ⚠️ A background task hit an error. The bot is still running — check the logs.
update_error: ⚠️ Couldn't process that — something went wrong. Please try again.
alarm_alert_header:
🔔 *New SEC filings detected* — {count} total
Tap to analyze:
alarm_expired: This alert has expired — run /check instead.
on_demand_scan:
🔍 On-demand scan: *{ticker}* | Forms: `{forms}`
_(not added to watchlist)_
sentiment_no_transactions: ✅ *No insider transactions found in the last 30 days.*
yfinance_missing:
❌ `{cmd}` requires the optional `yfinance` package.
Install it with: `pip install yfinance`
checkprice_usage:
Usage: `/checkprice TICKER [days]`
Example: `/checkprice AAPL 30` (default 7 days, range 1-365)
checkprice_no_data: ℹ️ No price data for *{ticker}* in the last {days} day(s).
checkprice_fetch_error: ❌ Could not fetch prices for *{ticker}* (network or rate limit).
checkprice_block:
💹 *{ticker}* — last {days} day(s) ({count} trading days)
{emoji} *{pct}%* change
📅 {start_date}: open `{start_open}`
📅 {end_date}: close `{end_close}`
📊 high `{high}` · low `{low}`
checknews_fetch_error: ❌ Could not fetch news for *{ticker}* (network or rate limit).
dailynews_enabled:
✅ Daily news feed enabled — sent every day at 08:00.
To see now, type `/dailynews now`.
dailynews_none: 📭 No fresh news today for your watchlist tickers.
rich_enabled: ✅ Rich formatting on. To disable, type `/setrich off`.
rich_disabled: ✅ Rich formatting disabled (plain Markdown will be used).
rich_unsupported: ⚠️ Your Telegram client/bot version does not support rich messages — falling back to plain Markdown.
rich_test_sample:
# Rich Message Test

**Bold text** and *italic* should work here.

| Ticker | Form | Change |
| --- | --- | --- |
| AAPL | 10-K | +2.3% |
| MSFT | 8-K | -1.1% |

<details>
<summary>Collapsible section</summary>

This block should be collapsible.

- Item one
- Item two
- Item three

</details>

If you can see this sample, rich formatting works.
compare_usage:
Usage: `/compare AAPL MSFT [FORM]`
FORM defaults to `10-K`.
Example: `/compare AAPL MSFT 10-Q`
compare_missing: ❌ Could not fetch `{form}` for *{ticker}* (not found or no recent filing).
sentiment_trend_no_data: ℹ️ No sentiment history yet. Run `/sentiment` first.
group_no_valid_tickers: ❌ No valid ticker symbols provided for group `{name}`.
addticker_usage: Usage: `/addticker AAPL` or `/addticker AAPL MSFT NVDA`
listtickers_empty:
📋 Watchlist is empty.
Add one with `/addticker AAPL`.
addgroup_usage:
Usage: `/addgroup NAME TICKER [TICKER...]`
Example: `/addgroup tech AAPL MSFT NVDA`
group_name_invalid: ❌ Invalid group name `{name}`. Use 1-32 chars: letters, digits, `_`, `-`.
listgroups_empty:
📋 No groups defined.
Add one with `/addgroup tech AAPL MSFT`.
form_not_in_default: ℹ️ `{form}` is not in default forms.
setprompt_usage:
Usage: `/setprompt 10-K <custom prompt text>`

Example:
`/setprompt 10-K Focus only on capital allocation and free cash flow.`
no_custom_prompt: ℹ️ No custom prompt for `{form}` — using default.
prompt_reset: ✅ Custom prompt for `{form}` reset — default will be used.
listprompts_empty:
ℹ️ No custom prompts defined.
Add one with `/setprompt 10-K <text>`.
cmd_desc_scan: Scan watchlist for new SEC filings
cmd_desc_checkprice: Recent price action for a ticker
cmd_desc_checknews: Latest news headlines for a ticker
cmd_desc_search: Search SEC database by company name
cmd_desc_status: Show bot status and error counts
settings_block:
⚙️ *Current Settings*

🔑 Default AI     : `{active_provider}`
🤖 Model          : `{model}`
📅 Lookback       : `{lookback} days`
📝 Max chars      : `{max_chars}`
📋 Forms          : `{forms}`
🏢 Tickers        : `{ticker_count} ticker(s)`{ticker_list}
🌐 Language       : `{language}`
⏰ Schedule       : `{schedule}`
🔔 Filing alarm   : `{alarm}`
📊 Weekly digest  : `{digest}`
✏️ Custom prompts : `{prompt_count} form(s)`
📦 Registered     : `{registered_providers}`

`/setmodel` · `/setlookback` · `/setchars`
`/setschedule` · `/alarm` · `/digest` · `/status` · `/setlang`
status_block:
📡 *Bot Status*

⏱ Uptime         : `{uptime}`
🔄 Last update    : `{last_update}`
🔍 Last scan      : `{last_scan}`
🔔 Last alarm chk : `{last_alarm}`
📊 Total analyzed : `{total_analyzed}`

❗ Telegram errors: `{tg_errors}`
❗ OpenRouter errs: `{or_errors}`

🌐 Language         : `{language}`
⏰ Schedule         : `{schedule}`
🔔 Alarm            : `{alarm}`
📊 Weekly digest    : `{digest}`
🏢 Tracking       : `{ticker_count} ticker(s)`
status_rich:
### 📡 Bot Status

| Field | Value |
|:--|:--|
| ⏱ Uptime | `{uptime}` |
| 🔄 Last update | `{last_update}` |
| 🔍 Last scan | `{last_scan}` |
| 🔔 Last alarm | `{last_alarm}` |
| 📊 Total analyzed | `{total_analyzed}` |
| ❗ Telegram errors | `{tg_errors}` |
| ❗ OpenRouter errors | `{or_errors}` |
| 🌐 Language | `{language}` |
| ⏰ Schedule | `{schedule}` |
| 🔔 Alarm | `{alarm}` |
| 📊 Weekly digest | `{digest}` |
| 🏢 Tracking | `{ticker_count} ticker(s)` |
rawmax_set: ✅ Raw filing store capped at `{n}` entries (oldest evicted first).
alarm_enabled: ✅ Filing alarm enabled — checking every hour.
digest_enabled:
✅ Weekly digest enabled — will be sent every Sunday at 09:00.
Use `/digest now` to send immediately.
digest_no_data: Weekly digest: no data to send.
digest_no_filings: No new filings analyzed this week.
setlang_usage:
Usage: `/setlang en` or `/setlang tr`
Current: `{current}`
Supported: `{supported}`
wizard_lang_menu:
👋 *Welcome / Hoş geldin!*

Please pick a language / Lütfen bir dil seç:

🇬🇧 `/lang en` — English
🇹🇷 `/lang tr` — Türkçe
wizard_lang_unknown: Use `/lang en` or `/lang tr` / `/lang en` veya `/lang tr` kullan
wizard_api_menu:
🔑 *Step 1 / 3 — Add an LLM API key* _(optional)_

Supported providers: `openrouter`, `openai`, `anthropic`, `gemini`, `deepseek`, `grok`

Example: `/addapi openrouter sk-or-...`

📴 No key? Bot works in No-AI mode — AI features disabled.

⏭ `/skip` — continue without a key
wizard_api_more: ✅ Key saved. Add another provider or `/skip` to continue.
wizard_form_menu:
📋 *Step 2 / 3 — Choose default form types*

*Periodic Reports*
  `10-K` Annual · `10-Q` Quarterly · `8-K` Current

*Insider & Ownership*
  `4` Insider transactions · `144` Restricted sale
  `SC 13G` Passive >5% · `SC 13D` Active >5%

*Offerings*
  `S-1` IPO · `424B4` Prospectus

*Foreign Issuers*
  `20-F` Annual · `6-K` Current

*Other*
  `DEF 14A` Proxy · `11-K` Retirement plan

Recommended: `10-K  10-Q  8-K  4`

✅ `/usedefaults` · ✏️ `/setforms 10-K 10-Q 8-K 4 SC 13G`
wizard_ticker_menu:
📋 *Step 3 / 3 — Add your first tickers*

`/addticker AAPL MSFT NVDA`

⏭ `/skip` — skip for now
wizard_complete:
✅ *Setup complete!*
Type `/help` to see all commands.
bot_active:
🤖 *SEC Analyzer Bot v{version} active.*
Type `/help` for commands.
export_no_data: ℹ️ No filings to export — nothing analyzed this week yet.
report_no_data: ℹ️ No filings analyzed this week yet.
report_footer: *This report was generated automatically. Not investment advice.*
unverified_figures: ⚠️ Could not verify against filing data: {items}
help_block:
🤖 *SEC Analyzer Bot v{version}*

🔍 *Scans*
`/scan` — scan all tickers
`/all` — scan + insider filings
`/insider` — insider (Form 4) filings
`/sentiment` — portfolio insider score
`/sentiment trend [days]` — sentiment shift vs N days ago

📊 *On-demand*
`/scanticker AAPL` · `/scanticker AAPL 10-K 4`
`/compare AAPL MSFT 10-K` — side-by-side
`/checkprice AAPL [days]` · `/checknews AAPL [count]`

📑 *Financial Sheets (EDGAR)*
`/sheet AAPL` · `/sheet AAPL 2020-2023 yearly`
`/sheet AAPL quarterly` — quarterly data
`/fulltext AAPL` — send filing as .md file
`/search Apple` — search SEC by company name
`/company AAPL` — show company info

🏢 *Tickers*
`/addticker AAPL MSFT` · `/removeticker AAPL` · `/listtickers`

📂 *Groups*
`/addgroup tech AAPL MSFT` · `/removegroup tech` · `/listgroups`
`/scangroup tech` · `/scangroup tech 10-K 4`

📋 *Forms*
`/listforms` · `/addform SC 13G` · `/removeform 8-K`

🔍 *Watchwords*
`/addword revenue guidance` · `/removeword revenue` · `/listwords`

💹 *Portfolio*
`/addpos AAPL 10 150.00` · `/removepos AAPL` · `/pnl`

✏️ *Custom Prompts*
`/setprompt 10-K <text>` · `/getprompt 10-K`
`/resetprompt 10-K` · `/listprompts`

⏰ *Schedule*
`/setschedule 08:00` · `/setschedule off`
`/alarm` · `/alarm off`
`/digest` · `/digest now` · `/digest off`
`/dailynews` · `/dailynews now` · `/dailynews off`

📄 *Reports*
`/report` · `/export` — send analyses as file

🔑 *API Keys (admin)*
`/addapi openrouter sk-or-...` · `/apis` · `/setapi openrouter` · `/delapi openrouter`

💬 *Chats (admin)*
`/addchat` · `/removechat` · `/listchats`

🌐 *Language*
`/setlang en` · `/setlang tr`

🔗 *Webhook*
`/setwebhook <url>` · `/delwebhook`

⚙️ *Settings*
`/settings` · `/status`
`/setmodel` · `/setlookback 60` · `/setchars 15000` · `/setrawmax 200000`
`/priceaction on|off` · `/setlookforward 5`
`/setrich on|off` — rich formatting

`*Active forms:* {forms}`
`*Tracking:* {ticker_count} ticker(s)`
`*Language:* {language}`
cmd_desc_addword: Add a keyword phrase to monitor in EDGAR full-text search
addword_limit: ⚠️ Limit reached ({max} phrases max). Remove one with /removeword first.
removeword_not_found: `{word}` is not in the watchword list.
listwords_empty: No watchword phrases set. Add one with /addword.
watchword_alert_rich_more: *+{n} more filing(s) — search EDGAR for full list*
watchword_alert_more: _+{n} more filing(s) — search EDGAR for full list_
cmd_desc_addpos: Add a position lot (ticker, qty, price, optional date)
cmd_desc_removepos: Remove all lots for a ticker from the portfolio
addpos_usage:
Usage: /addpos TICKER QTY PRICE [DATE]
Example: /addpos AAPL 10 150.50 2024-01-15
addpos_invalid_qty: ⚠️ Invalid quantity — must be a positive number.
addpos_invalid_cost: ⚠️ Invalid price — must be zero or a positive number.
addpos_limit: ⚠️ Portfolio limit reached ({max} lots). Remove a position first.
pnl_empty: Portfolio is empty. Add positions with /addpos.
addchat_limit: ⚠️ Limit reached ({max} chats max). Remove one with /removechat first.
addchat_format_error: ⚠️ Invalid chat ID — must be an integer. Usage: /addchat <id>
removechat_not_found: ⚠️ Chat `{id}` is not in the authorized list.
removechat_self_remove: ⚠️ You cannot remove your own admin chat.
removechat_format_error: ⚠️ Invalid chat ID — must be an integer. Usage: /removechat <id>
unauthorized_admin: ⚠️ This command is restricted to the admin chat.
env_import_done:
ℹ️ *Settings migrated from .env:* {keys}

These values are now stored in `bot_config.json`. You can safely remove those lines from your `.env` file.
welcome_bootstrap:
🎉 *SEC Analyzer Bot v{version} ready!*

Admin chat: `{master_chat_id}` ⭐

Type `/help` to see all commands.

📌 Use `/addapi` to add your LLM API key (OpenRouter, Gemini, Anthropic, Groq, DeepSeek).
⏭ Type `/skip` if you've added your key or want to continue without one.
addapi_group_rejected: ⚠️ API keys must be sent in a *private chat* — group members can see messages before deletion.
addapi_prompt:
🔑 Send your *{provider}* API key as the *next message*.

The message will be deleted immediately to protect your key.

_Timeout: 2 minutes. Send any command to cancel._
addapi_invalid_key_short: ⚠️ Key too short — must be at least 8 characters. Try again with `/addapi`.
addapi_key_prefix_warn:
⚠️ This doesn't look like a *{provider}* key. Expected prefix: `{expected}` (got `{got}`).
Saved anyway — double-check your key.
apis_empty: No API keys configured. Add one with `/addapi <provider>`.
setapi_unknown: ⚠️ Provider `{provider}` not found or has no key. Add a key first with `/addapi {provider}`.
setapi_done_model:
✅ Default provider set to *{provider}*.
Model set to `{model}`.
setapi_model_menu:
📋 Available models for *{provider}* (current: `{current}`):

Use `/setapi {provider} <model>` to set.
llm_retry_expired: Retry expired — please run your command again.
llm_key_invalid: ⚠️ API key for *{provider}* is invalid (401). Update it with `/addapi {provider}`.
no_ai_no_keys: 🤖 AI mode is off — no API key configured. Add one with `/addapi`.
no_ai_all_failed: ⚠️ All AI providers are currently unavailable — raw text sent, will retry later.
no_ai_reminder: 🤖 *AI mode is off.* No API key is configured. Add one with `/addapi` to enable analysis.
sheet_usage:
Usage: `/sheet TICKER [year-range] [quarterly|yearly]`
Example: `/sheet AAPL 2020-2023 yearly`
Default: last 4 years, yearly.
sheet_fetch_failed: ⚠️ Could not fetch financial data for *{ticker}*. Check the ticker or try again later.
sheet_no_data: ⚠️ No data found for *{ticker}* in the specified range.
search_error: ❌ Search failed for *{query}*. Try a different name.
fulltext_usage:
Usage: `/fulltext TICKER [FORM]`
Example: `/fulltext AAPL 10-K`
Default form: 10-K
